description_long: This is a three-story brick factory building with a robust industrial appearance, featuring large arched windows with metal grilles on each floor. The facade is constructed from reddish-brown brickwork, accented by stone or concrete sills and lintels, and a dark stone base. The main entrance is accessed by a short set of stairs with metal railings, and the front is adorned with industrial-style lamps. One side of the building has a protruding bay with additional windows and a visible HVAC unit, while the other side is more utilitarian with a large pipe and vent. The flat roof is bordered by a low parapet and is free of visible machinery or equipment. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century industrial architecture, emphasizing function and durability.
description: A three-story brick factory building with large arched industrial windows, a prominent front entrance, and utilitarian side features such as pipes and an HVAC unit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three rows of large arched windows, and decorative lamps above the doorway.
description_view_1: Side view with a protruding bay, two large windows, and a visible HVAC unit and pipe attached to the brick wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with three rows of large arched windows similar to the front, but without an entrance or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a long pipe and vent, with no windows or architectural embellishments.
